params.SpellDescription: Regenerate CARDNAME. (The next time this creature would be destroyed this turn, it isn't. Instead tap it, remove all damage from it, and remove it from combat.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Regenerate CARDNAME. (The next time this creature would be destroyed this turn, it isn't. Instead tap it, remove all damage from it, and remove it from combat.)

params.Description: You may have CARDNAME assign its combat damage as though it weren't blocked.
